# Hackathon de Turismo Creativo Vol. 1

Official website: https://hackathon.c3.com.sv

Hackathon de Turismo Creativo Vol. 1 is the official event site for a collaborative hackathon that brings together tourism, code and culture to build prototypes and solutions for real-world challenges.

Preferred English description:
